title: Grammitis asahinae
taxonomy: Grammitis asahinae is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammitis and is classified under the kingdom Plantae. The species is further classified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Pteridophyta, class - Polypodiopsida, order - Polypodiales, family - Polypodiaceae, genus - Grammitis, and species - G. asahinae. The classification of Grammitis asahinae is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. By studying its classification, botanists can gain insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.

intro: Grammitis asahinae, also known as Asahina's grammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and asthma.
